briefdescription.para: This function triggers an IPI to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the Mask of the CPU to which IPI is to be triggered
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

memberdef.argsstring: (XMailbox *InstancePtr, u32 RemoteId, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType, u8 Is_Blocking)
memberdef.name: XMailbox_SendData

briefdescription.para: This function sends an IPI message to a destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the Mask of the CPU to which IPI is to be triggered
is the pointer to Buffer which contains the message to be sent
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
is the type of buffer (XILMBOX_MSG_TYPE_REQ (OR) XILMBOX_MSG_TYPE_RESP)
if set trigger the notification in blocking mode

memberdef.argsstring: (XMailbox *InstancePtr, u32 SourceId, void *BufferPtr, u32 MsgLen, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.name: XMailbox_Recv

briefdescription.para: This function reads an IPI message.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XMailbox instance
is the Mask for the CPU which has sent the message
is the pointer to Buffer to which the read message needs to be stored
is the number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
is the type of buffer (XILMBOX_MSG_TYPE_REQ or XILMBOX_MSG_TYPE_RESP)

briefdescription.para: This routine installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType.

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ----------------------- -------------------------------------------------- XMAILBOX_RECV_HANDLER Recv handler XMAILBOX_ERROR_HANDLER Error handler

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMailbox instance.
specifies which callback is to be attached.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the shared memory location for IPI usage.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMailbox instance.
Address of shared memory location
Size of the memory location

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - if memory is set for IPI usage

briefdescription.para: This function returns the shared memory location for IPI usage.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMailbox instance.
Pointer to the address of the variable for which memory needs to be assigned

listitem.para: Size Size of the memory allocated for IPI usage

briefdescription.para: This function releases the shared memory.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE - if memory is not released
